name: Unusual Lemon Tart
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces fat (1 ounce lard and 1 ounce margarine)
4 tablespoons water to mix (additional water may be required)
recipeInstructions:
-------------
For filling:
1 large cooking apple
1 lemon
1 egg
3 ounces sugar
1. Make the pastry and line a 7-inch flan ring.
2. Peel and grate the apple, add the sugar, then add the grated rind and juice of the lemon.
3. Beat the egg, add it to the apple mixture, and mix well.
4. Place the filling into the tart case and bake at 350°F (170°C) for 25-40 minutes.
